title: Transfer of possession
doc_html:
SECTION 5.  TRANSFER, TACKING, AND PROOF OF POSSESSION

Art. 3441.  Transfer of possession

Possession is transferable by universal title or by particular title.

Acts 1982, No. 187, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983.
